name: Als Limited
analysis: ALQ has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Trade setup: entry A$22.9913, stop A$21.5934, target A$24.1866. Risk/reward is 0.86:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
